claim: Claude Code in Slack is built on the existing Claude for Slack app and adds intelligent routing that creates a Claude Code session on the web when @Claude is mentioned with a coding task.
quote: Claude Code in Slack brings the power of Claude Code directly into your Slack workspace. When you mention `@Claude` with a coding task, Claude automatically detects the intent and creates a Claude Code session on the web... This integration is built on the existing Claude for Slack app

claim: Prerequisites are a Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise Claude plan with Claude Code access, Claude Code on the web enabled, a connected GitHub account with at least one authenticated repo, and a linked Slack identity.
quote: Claude Plan | Pro, Max, Team, or Enterprise with Claude Code access... Claude Code on the web | Access to Claude Code on the web must be enabled... GitHub Account | Connected to Claude Code on the web with at least one repository authenticated

claim: Two routing modes — Code only and Code + Chat — control whether @Claude mentions always go to Claude Code or are intent-classified between Claude Code and Claude Chat, with a Retry as Code button to override.
quote: Code only | Claude routes all @mentions to Claude Code sessions... Code + Chat | Claude analyzes each message and intelligently routes between Claude Code (for coding tasks) and Claude Chat... if Claude routes a message to Chat but you wanted a coding session, you can click "Retry as Code"

claim: Claude Code in Slack only works in channels (public or private) where Claude has been explicitly invited via /invite @Claude, not in DMs.
quote: Claude Code in Slack only works in channels (public or private). It does not work in direct messages (DMs)... Type `/invite @Claude` in any channel to add Claude to that channel

claim: Each session runs under the invoking user's Claude account and counts against their personal rate limits; users can only target repos they have personally connected, and current limits include GitHub-only support and one PR per session.
quote: Each user runs sessions under their own Claude account... Users can only access repositories they've personally connected... GitHub only: Currently supports repositories on GitHub. One PR at a time: Each session can create one pull request.

claim: The Slack thread surfaces status updates, a completion summary, and action buttons — View Session, Create PR, Retry as Code, Change Repo — while the full transcript and code changes live on claude.ai/code.
quote: View Session: Opens the full Claude Code session in your browser... Create PR: Creates a pull request directly from the session's changes... Retry as Code... Change Repo: Allows you to select a different repository

claim: Claude for Slack is the broader first-party app for drafting, summarizing threads, prepping meetings and quick research, and it now also acts as the entry point that automatically relays detected coding requests to Claude Code as remote sessions.
quote: Claude Code users can ask @Claude to handle coding tasks and it will run them remotely, providing updates when completed... when Claude detects coding-related requests, it will automatically relay the request to Claude Code to start a remote session.

claim: The Slack App Directory listing for Claude (vendor: Anthropic, app ID A08SF47R6P4) advertises help with coding tasks that auto-route to Claude Code and requests broad scopes to view and act in channels, conversations and the workspace as the user.
quote: help with coding tasks to automatically route work to Claude Code... Content and info about channels & conversations... Perform actions as you... Perform actions in channels & conversations... Perform actions in your workspace

claim: Anthropic launched Claude Code in Slack as a research preview on December 8, 2025, framing it as letting developers delegate full coding workflows — repo selection, investigation, fix, PR — from a Slack thread.
quote: Announcement Date: December 8, 2025... Status: Beta/research preview, available starting Monday (December 8)... 'delegate coding tasks directly from chat threads'... Determine the appropriate repository... Share links to review work and open pull requests

claim: Salesforce's announcement frames Claude Code in Slack as a preview that strengthens Slack's growing agent ecosystem, positioning Claude Code as an in-Slack agent rather than a separate IDE-only tool.
quote: Anthropic Previews Claude Code for Slack, Strengthening the Platform's Growing Ecosystem of Agents

claim: Anthropic's general 'Claude and Slack' announcement (published Oct 1 2025, updated Jan 26 2026) covers the broader Claude for Slack app and the Slack connector for Team/Enterprise customers, but does not itself describe Claude Code routing.
quote: published October 1, 2025 (with an update on January 26, 2026)... 'The Slack connector is available for Claude Team and Enterprise plan customers'... There is no mention of 'Claude Code' specifically being integrated into Slack in this document.
